en.extract:
The blue-headed sunbird (Cyanomitra alinae) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae.
It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests.

The '''blue-headed sunbird''' ('''''Cyanomitra alinae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]].
It is native to the [[Albertine Rift montane forests]].
